title: [kimi-review] 16071f4: [SEVERITY: high] **The issue is closed based on a fix that d
description:
Commit: 16071f4c3
Message: fix(senml): validate u64 in dec_int for negative CBOR

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **The issue is closed based on a fix that doesn't exist.** `close_reason` asserts "Matches suggested fix exactly. Commit recorded," which falsely marks project-LICHEN-65td as resolved. This silently drops a real correctness/security bug from the tracker with no patch to verify, and makes the repo state look fixed when it isn't.
